title: ZENITH PVP ESSENTIALS
description: A Texture Pack made for CPVP and revamps all the pvp items in a smooth black/grey clean look
body:
**A Texture Pack made for CPVP and revamps all the pvp items in a smooth black/grey style and gives them a brand new look the Pack contains Following things: **

respawn anchor
glowstone
obsidian
ender pearl
golden apple
animated totem
low fire
deepslate
small shield
no explosion particles
better particles
small totem pop
old glint
invis grass & dead bushes
invis ores for clean game
